ol.li:
Loop N nodes:
pipe(p_fd)
fork() -> dup2() pipe ends
Close unused FDs
Wait for all PIDs in group
Return right child's status Used for ';' separator
Parent: Print job ID and PID
Env changes (CWD, vars) lost Syntax: ( cmd_list )
Env changes persist in parent Syntax: { cmd_list; }

Loop:
Run cond_ast
If status != 0: break
Run body_ast

For each word in list:
Update env variable
Run body_ast
